description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bazel that runs on push to main, pull requests to main, and merge groups to main. The workflow has two ubuntu-latest jobs, build_direct and build_indirect, which check out the repository with submodules, mount a bazel cache, install bazelisk, and then run various bazel commands to build and test the project. The workflow also installs Flex and Bison and uses a concurrency group to cancel in-progress runs on non-main branches.
